study_name: 92mm Industrial Fan - Static Pressure Sensitivity Analysis

objectives.primary: Identify geometry with >0.5 inH2O peak static pressure.

critical_sensitivity_points.hypothesis: Reducing clearance from 1.0mm to 0.5mm will significantly increase pressure at high impedance.
9 blades will provide smoother pressure delivery than 7, but may increase drag/power consumption.
Increased hub pitch (>45deg) is necessary to maintain flow against the dense PSU grill rings.

test_matrix.description: Optimized for static pressure via tight tip clearance.
7-blade configuration for high airflow / low noise potential.
Maximum camber and pitch for high-impedance PSU environments.
